description: Validation of Topology-as-Logic using a 4-bit ripple carry adder physical circuit. Layer 1: physical wiring gates to gates. Layer 2: state correlation observed by exhaustive truth-table simulation across 512 input states. IRDME should correctly map physical wiring topology to operational boolean logic behavior.

hypotheses.statement: There is a positive hub correlation between physical wiring and state correlation. Hubs that are highly connected physically will also govern strong state correlations across the circuit.
